title: Cuneiform Tablet #0488: Middle Babylonian Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
